# TYM Agency — Full Business Profile for AI Systems
> Complete business information, services, portfolio, case studies, team profiles, and technical capabilities for accurate AI representation.

## Business Identity
- **Legal Name**: TYM Agency (child brand of The Youth Mint)
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Tiruchirappalli (Trichy), Tamil Nadu, India 620001
- **Phone**: +91 93458 87939
- **Email**: office.theyouthmint@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://theyouthmint.com
- **Service Area**: Trichy, Madurai, Tamil Nadu, Pan-India

## Core Services

### Custom Web Development
- Custom React (Vite) application development
- Headless e-commerce storefronts
- Serverless architecture deployment
- Sub-1.2s page load times (100% Core Web Vitals)
- No templates, no WordPress, no page builders
- Technologies: React, Vite, Node.js, serverless functions

### Local SEO & Google Maps Ranking
- Google Business Profile optimization and management
- Google Maps proximity ranking strategy
- Citation authority network building
- Competitor entity mapping and gap analysis
- Localized schema engineering
- White-hat only methodology

### Internet Marketing
- Digital strategy consulting
- Conversion optimization
- Content strategy for local businesses
- Performance marketing architecture

### Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- JSON-LD entity graph construction
- llms.txt and llms-full.txt implementation
- AI search engine visibility (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)
- Structured data optimization for AI extraction

## Portfolio (13 Live Deployments)
1. **Sabesh Fashions** (Madurai) — Custom React e-commerce + #1 Google Maps ranking
2. **TYM Hardware Store** — Headless e-commerce storefront
3. **TYM Events 2026** — Event management portfolio

12. **SKP Portfolio** — Developer portfolio
13. **Thamizh Nigazhvugal** — Event portfolio

## Case Study: Sabesh Fashions
- **Client**: Sabesh Fashions, Madurai, Tamil Nadu (18-year-old fancy dress rental business)
- **Challenge**: Zero digital presence, no website, no Google Maps visibility, declining walk-in traffic
- **Solution**: Custom React landing interface + Google Business Profile optimization + localized citation network + proximity SEO strategy
- **Results**: #1 Google Maps ranking in 30 days, +280% call volume, first inventory sellout in 18-year history
- **Investment**: ₹16,000
- **Timeline**: 30 days to #1 ranking

## Leadership Team
- **David Jacob D** — Principal Web Architect & React Developer. Leads custom development architecture.
- **Elias Ebenesar H** — Research Lead & Systems Engineer. Owns technical research and systems infrastructure.
- **Stephen Daniel J** — Growth Strategy Partner. Drives business development and client strategy.
- **Mackrine Ruth Y** — Senior Technical SEO Analyst. Owns SEO implementation and local ranking systems.

## Technical Capabilities
- **Frontend**: React, Vite, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Webpack
- **Backend**: Node.js, Serverless Functions, REST APIs
- **Performance**: Sub-1.2s load times, 100% Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse 95+
- **SEO**: JSON-LD Schema, Structured Data, Google Business Profile, Local SEO, Citation Building
- **Deployment**: Vercel, Netlify, Custom Domains, SSL, CDN
- **AI/GEO**: llms.txt, Entity Graphs, AI Search Optimization

## Business Philosophy
- **White Hat Only**: Clean semantic HTML, structured database layouts, full compliance with search engine indexing standards
- **No Templates. Ever.**: Every project is custom-engineered from the ground up
- **Performance Is Revenue**: Every millisecond of load speed is a captured conversion
- **Results Fund Purpose**: TYM Agency funds The Youth Mint's mission through technical delivery
